summary: HRA's own reporting attributes the Fiscal 2023 collapse in SNAP application timeliness (to 39.7%) to an unprecedented surge in applications combined with staff attrition and retirements, plus the expiration of pandemic-era state waivers that had suspended recertification requirements, which created a backlog. The recovery to 87.6% by Fiscal 2025 reflects new staff hires and process and technology improvements HRA implemented in response.

sources.label: Human Resources Administration, Fiscal 2023 Mayor's Management Report
Human Resources Administration, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report
